title: Assumption Register Entry
description: A single entry in the assumption register, documenting a project assumption, its owner, validation status, and impact if proven invalid.

description.description: Clear statement of the assumption being made

type.description: Assumption category for classification and reporting

owner.description: Person or role responsible for validating this assumption

origin_phase.description: Lifecycle phase in which this assumption was first documented

evidence_available.description: Whether supporting evidence for this assumption currently exists

validation_deadline.description: Date by which this assumption must be validated (ISO 8601)

impact_if_invalid.description: Description of consequences to scope, timeline, or design if this assumption proves wrong

status.description: Current validation status of the assumption
